title: Crackdown 2
short_description: The open-world superhero sequel returns to Pacific City, now overrun by a mutant plague and a rogue militia.
description: Crackdown 2 is an open-world action game developed by Ruffian Games (now Rockstar Dundee) and published by Microsoft Studios. Set ten years after the original Crackdown, Pacific City has descended into chaos as a mutant plague called the Freaks emerges at night and a militant insurgency called the Cell wages war on the Agency. Players once again control a genetically enhanced Agent, now tasked with activating beacons across the city to eradicate the Freaks. The game supports four-player co-op and received mixed reviews on release.
